A Soul Sent From Above
✦   Chapter One   ✦
✦ ✦ ✦

From the very first moment, there was something different about you. Something that cannot be performed or rehearsed — it was simply there, woven into who you are. A gentleness that does not waver. A kindness that does not ask for anything in return.

You carry your calling with such quiet grace. Not the loud kind that demands attention, but the steady kind that changes rooms without announcing itself. The kind that stays long after you have left.

Today, heaven celebrates the day it sent you here. And so do we.

A Life Worth Celebrating
Grace in every moment
Celebrated ✦ Beloved
"Celebrating an amazing woman — wishing you long life, good health, and overflowing blessings."
A Letter From The Heart
Dearest Sister Maryanne,
— With love and gratitude 🙏
Our Prayer For You
On this special day and always
May God continue to honour you as you have honoured Him.
May your joy be full and your peace be unshakeable.
May every seed of kindness you have sown return to you a hundredfold.
May your health be strong, your spirit radiant, your calling fruitful.
May this be your best year yet, Sister.
✦   "She is clothed with strength and dignity, and she laughs without fear of the future."   ✦

Proverbs 31:25
✝
Happy Birthday
Sr. Maryanne

"I have called you by name — you are mine."
Isaiah 43:1
With love — from those whose lives you have touched 🙏
God knew what He was doing when He made you, Sister. Happy Birthday. ✝
